auth.label: Integration API Key
auth.description: Linguapop integration API key sent in the sendInvitation request body. Organization admins can add integrations and view or refresh API keys in Linguapop Integrations: https://docs.linguapop.eu/integrations/.

actions.name: list_available_languages
actions.description: Fetch the available Linguapop placement test languages and their stable language codes.

inputSchema.description: No parameters are required to fetch Linguapop languages.

name.description: Human-readable name of the language supported by Linguapop.

code.description: Stable Linguapop language code to use when creating placement test invitations.

items.description: A language supported by Linguapop placement tests.

languages.description: The list of available placement test languages returned by Linguapop.

actions.name: send_invitation
actions.description: Create a Linguapop placement test invitation for a candidate, optionally send an email, generate a kiosk code, and configure callback or return URLs.

externalIdentifier.description: Optional CRM, LMS, or website identifier used to track the candidate.

name.description: Optional candidate name to include on the invitation.

email.description: Candidate email address for the placement test.

languageCode.description: Linguapop language code for the placement test, such as eng, ita, spa, ger, or fra.

sendEmail.description: Whether Linguapop should send an invitation email to the candidate.

generateKioskCode.description: Whether Linguapop should generate and return a kiosk code for the candidate.

testReading.description: Whether the placement test should include a reading section.

testListening.description: Whether the placement test should include a listening section.

callbackUrl.description: Callback URL where Linguapop should POST placement test results when the test is completed.

returnUrl.description: URL where the candidate should be redirected after completing the placement test.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for creating a Linguapop placement test invitation.

invitationId.description: Unique Linguapop invitation identifier for tracking the placement test.

anyOf.description: The external identifier echoed by Linguapop, or null when none was supplied.

url.description: Direct URL to the Linguapop placement test invitation.

emailSent.description: Whether Linguapop successfully sent the invitation email.

anyOf.description: Generated kiosk code for the candidate, or null when no kiosk code was requested.

outputSchema.description: The Linguapop placement test invitation result.
